named-native-query.name: getGmailSyncAddedIncomes
named-native-query.query: SELECT it.* FROM income_table it WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE it.user_id = :userId AND it.entry_mode = 'GMAIL_SYNC' AND CAST(it.gmail_sync_date AS DATE) = :date

named-native-query.name: getGmailSyncAddedExpenses
named-native-query.query: SELECT et.* FROM expense_table et WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE et.user_id = :userId AND et.entry_mode = 'GMAIL_SYNC' AND CAST(et.gmail_sync_date AS DATE) = :date

named-native-query.name: getCategoryNameByCategoryId
named-native-query.query: SELECT clt.category FROM category_list_table clt WHERE clt.id = :categoryId
